closedGaps: Separate Community, Clan and TSBTR setup templates
Preview, repair, guide-only and typed destructive confirmation flows
Owner-only dashboard with live runtime inventory and HEX branding
Structured profile, short Roblox verification, challenge, availability and LOA flows
Training sessions with host ownership, end state and activity logging
Configurable channel mappings, challenge ranges, quotas and AutoMod policy
Relations list with ally/enemy status and update-in-place behavior

remainingGaps.reason: The specification requires backup, preview and the typed phrase REBUILD <MODE>.

remainingGaps.item: External TSBCC leaderboard scraping and unsolicited DM automation
remainingGaps.reason: A bot cannot join as a normal user or automate a personal account; cross-server data requires the bot to be authorized and permitted.
Requires a separate licensed media/voice architecture and deployment dependencies; it is not mixed into the moderation bot runtime.
Recommendations are produced; role mutation remains opt-in through autoRoleChanges.
